docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLANCO, VILLY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SARA PASTORA INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. THE COURT AMENDED DEFENDANT'S NAME TO: SARA PASTOR INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED MAR-04-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SARA PASTORA INSURANCE AGENCY, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,739.00 FILED BY POLANCO, VILLY AS TO DEFENDANT SARA PASTORA INSURANCE AGENCY, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DEPT. 506, SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR. 8, 2011, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. AFTER HEARING, MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY JUDGE DON MITCHELL. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (NO EXHIBIT RETAINED)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.
